title: quercus acutissima subsp. roxburghii
intro: Quercus acutissima subsp. roxburghii, also known as the Japanese sawtooth oak or sawtooth oak, is a deciduous tree species native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects, derived from its bark, leaves, and seeds. The health benefits of Quercus acutissima subsp. roxburghii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support immune function and promote overall well-being.
